channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jim Larrañaga steps down at Miami, Bill Courtney takes over to finish season
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Jim Larrañaga insists he still loves the University of Miami, still loves the game of basketball, still loves mentoring players, still loves coaching. He doesn't love what college basketball has become. And with that, he's leaving.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sirianni and Ertz cleared the air after exchanging words following Washington's win over the Eagles
item.description: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni and Commanders tight end Zach Ertz cleared the air after they exchanged words following Washington’s comeback win over Philadelphia on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cowboys shutting down CeeDee Lamb with 2 games to go over receiver's shoulder issue
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys are shutting down CeeDee Lamb with two games remaining after their 2023 All-Pro receiver spent the second half of the season dealing with a sprained right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Haaland penalty failure and Fernandes red card pile on woes for City and United in Premier League
item.description: Erling Haaland’s failure from the penalty spot and Bruno Fernandes' latest red card compounded the woes of Manchester City and Manchester United on another tough day for the two Premier League giants.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON and STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers put end to left tackle Trent Williams’ painful season
item.description: The 49ers (6-9) placed left tackle Trent Williams on injured reserve Thrusday, the result of an ankle injury that will have sidelined him their final seven games this season.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Holiday Bowl football players visit SeaWorld San Diego
item.description: Football players from the two teams facing off in the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl spent a few hours Wednesday morning celebrating Christmas at SeaWorld San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texans look for answers after embarrassing 31-2 home loss to the Ravens
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Quarterback C.J. Stroud summed up Houston’s performance in an embarrassing 31-2 loss to Baltimore on Wednesday. “Sometimes you go out there and lay an egg,” Stroud said. “It’s not easy to say that, but that’s what happened. Didn’t play well from the first play to the last.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in the Baltimore Ravens' victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. A highlight came when Jackson dashed 48 yards for a touchdown on a run where he reached a career-best top speed of 21.25 mph.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knicks' Mikal Bridges outduels Spurs' Victor Wembanyama; Knicks hold on for narrow victory
item.description: The New York Knicks held on for a 117-114 win over the San Antonio Spurs Christmas Day as Mikal Bridges scored 41 points and outdueled Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB legend, dies at 65: Reports
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB's all-time stolen base leader, dies at 65: reports
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WGN 9

item.title: NBA fines Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla $35,000 for postgame comments toward officials
item.description: The NBA fined the Boston Celtics coach $35,000 on Saturday “for aggressively pursuing and directing inappropriate language toward a game official” at the end of his team's loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bronny James is quietly having a solid December in the G League
item.description: Even underneath the shade of his legendary father, the spotlight on LeBron "Bronny" James Jr. was perhaps too much for any young player at the start of his professional basketball career — but months later, it seems as though he's figuring things out his own way.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
